headlines.title: Knockouts are here - what is England's path to the final?
headlines.description: BBC Sport takes a look at what England will need to do to reach the final after qualifying for the knockout stages.

headlines.title: Families calling out to loved ones trapped in rubble by Venezuela quakes
headlines.description: In La Guaira, desperate families keep vigil at buildings where they fear their relatives are trapped, but face an impossible task to move heavy debris.

headlines.title: Harry reconsiders bringing Meghan and children on UK trip
headlines.description: It comes after his request for police protection was rejected days before the family is due to arrive.

headlines.title: US and Iran exchange strikes and accuse each other of violating ceasefire
headlines.description: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain after the US said it hit multiple targets across Iran.

headlines.title: Why Kim Jong Un never talks about his mother - or her controversial bloodline
headlines.description: Very few North Koreans know about her, as her origin could threaten the regime’s legitimacy.

headlines.title: Bad Bunny: Latin star lights up London with history-making stadium show
headlines.description: Pride and a party as the Puerto Rican becomes the first Latin artist to headline a UK stadium.

headlines.title: England top group - but they will not win World Cup unless they improve
headlines.description: England did their job topping the group - but they can forget winning the World Cup if they do not improve, writes Phil McNulty.

headlines.title: Clarke leaves strong Scotland legacy but exit brings sense of relief
headlines.description: In his seven-year reign Steve Clarke took Scotland out of the wilderness but could not find the promised land of knockout major championship football, writes Tom English.

headlines.title: 27 flights, 24 matches: How Fifa's president is jetting around World Cup
headlines.description: Gianni Infantino has clocked up thousands of air miles across North America so far.

headlines.title: Are Iran the unluckiest side in the tournament's history?

headlines.description: Addiction treatment centres say more clients are coming for help with "out-of-control" phone use.

headlines.description: Brown talks to the BBC about having her "hands and heart" all over the detective adventure series.

headlines.title: These women said no to having kids - here's why

headlines.title: Tech firms are blaming AI for mega device and console price rises
headlines.description: Xbox consoles, Nintendo's new Switch 2 and Valve's Steam Deck are just some of the gadgets seeing price hikes in recent months.

headlines.title: How Andy Burnham's school teacher inspired him to believe in himself

headlines.title: Australia to double maximum penalty for platforms in breach of social media ban
headlines.description: Children under the age of 16 have been prevented from 10 key social media platforms in Australia since December 2025.

headlines.title: Body of missing woman found in park pool

headlines.title: Trump's face is added to select US passports for America's 250th birthday
headlines.description: The commemorative special edition passports will be available on 6 July, and can only be applied for in person

headlines.title: George Best's European Cup medal sells for £300k
headlines.description: The mazy winger was presented with his medal after Manchester United beat Benfica at Wembley Stadium.

headlines.title: Twins living identical lives for 82 years

headlines.title: RNLI 'welly guard of honour' for newlyweds
